title: Floral Canadian Rice Fried Rice
description: A vibrant and savory one-pan dish, perfect for a date night dinner in Canada. The combination of floral flavors and snappy textures will delight your taste buds.
instructions: Heat a medium saucepan over medium heat and toast the sesame oil for 1 minute.
Add the sliced scallions and cook until they start to caramelize, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the rice to the saucepan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Add the vegetable broth, rice vinegar, and sesame oil mixture to the saucepan and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until the rice is coated in the flavors.
Use a spatula to create a small well in the center of the rice and add the kneaded tofu to the well. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the tofu is heated through.
Stir the rice and tofu mixture to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until everything is heated through. Serve hot, garnished with additional scallions and sesame seeds if desired.
